revision.content:
== What it is ==

A chance for us to build some projects using the Spark.io board. It is a small, inexpensive (free for us!) Arduino-like board w/ wireless built-in, and a 'cloud' development environment and API.

Info on the Build Night Here: [http://www.instructables.com/community/November-2014-Build-Night-with-Sparkio/ Build Night]

We are going to be sent:
*(10) Spark Cores
*(10) Spark Buttons: a new shield for Spark with LEDs, 4-way clicking like a game controller, acceleration and temperature sensing.

Note: this is hosted by Instructables and they ask that we submit 2 Instructables about projects built at Build Night. Both Steve and Vic have volunteered to do write-ups, but the more the merrier.

== When it is ==
Need to finalize this but how about Tuesday the 11th, Thu the 13th, or Friday the 14th (or some combo)?

== Who we'd like to see there ==
*Hardware Hackers
*Software Hackers
*Artists with creative ideas
*Non-artists with creative ideas
*Artists or non-artists with practical ideas
*Somebody (or multiple somebodies) with cameras and camera skills to help document the projects

== Project Ideas ==
*Crawl Space Monitor
*Bathroom Occupancy sign in the Workshop
*Magic Wireless Neopixels people can interact w/ via the Web

== Stuff we need ==
(Make a 'wish list' of things you like to have there for building - hopefully we can pool resources amongst ourselves)
